stemHtml: What is the difference between an RNAV STAR and RNAV STAR overlay?

options.a: The RNAV STAR overlay is a longer route than the RNAV STAR.
options.b: The RNAV STAR overlay is a shorter route than the RNAV STAR.
options.c: The RNAV STAR overlay will follow a different route from the conventional STAR procedure.
options.d: The RNAV STAR overlay permits pilots to fly a conventional STAR procedure using GNSS equipment.
